cooling-stack-2025-06-25: Final cooling architecture: TLP manages baseline EPP (balance_power) and battery thresholds (40-80%). legion-thermal-guard monitors CPU temp via coretemp, throttles EPP to balance_power at 75°C, restores TLP's original EPP at 70°C. legion-fan-control writes custom fan curves via legion_laptop hwmon. nvidia-powerd manages GPU P0↔P8 with GSP firmware. throttled enforces 65W PL1/100W PL2. undervolt applies -90mV core/-40mV uncore.
firefox-switched-to-regular: Switched from firefox-devedition to firefox in home/tlh/default.nix. Dev edition uses .dev-edition-default profile naming that doesn't match home-manager's profile name (tlh). Regular Firefox uses the profile name directly.
gpu-power-management: Requires three things: NVreg_EnableGpuFirmware=1, NVreg_DynamicPowerManagement=0x02, and nvidia-powerd enabled. All three were lost in the June 22 refactor (commit 71124fe). Without DynamicPowerManagement=0x02, GPU idles at P4 (825 MHz, 9.7W) instead of P8 (210 MHz, 2.4W). nvidia-powerd burns 10% CPU if GSP firmware isn't loaded — must reboot after enabling.
nvidia-kernel-params-annotated: All 8 NVIDIA kernel params fully annotated in nvidia.nix: nvidia_drm.fbdev=1 (framebuffer for Wayland/console), nvidia-drm.modeset=1 (KMS for PRIME sync), NVreg_PreserveVideoMemoryAllocations=1 (preserve VRAM across VT switches), NVreg_EnableResizableBar=1 (full VRAM mapping), NVreg_UsePageAttributeTable=1 (modern PAT over MTRR), NVreg_InitializeSystemMemoryAllocations=0 (skip zeroing), NVreg_EnableGpuFirmware=1 (GSP for power management), NVreg_DynamicPowerManagement=0x02 (coarse-grained GPU suspend).
opencode-jsonc-schema-2026-06-27: opencode.jsonc must use permission with action-level keys (e.g. 'bash': 'allow'), not permission.scripts.allow. Provider format uses options.baseURL, not baseUrl. Schema URL is https://opencode.ai/config.json (not raw.githubusercontent.com). Tools registered as 'tools': { 'name': true }.
project-skills-2026-06-27: 4 project-specific skills created: nixos-module (enable-by-option module creation), nix-flake-ops (flake management), nixos-debug (build/eval debugging), nix-secrets (sops-nix secrets). All in .opencode/skills/ with SKILL.md + scripts/references/assets dirs.
project-tools-2026-06-27: 3 project-specific TypeScript tools created: nix-build (nixos-rebuild wrapper for 4 hosts), nix-flake (nix flake management), nix-format (alejandra formatting). All in .opencode/tools/ following @opencode-ai/plugin SDK pattern.
services-scrubbed-2025-06-25: Removed dead services: legion-cooling (EC read-only on g8cn/N0CN), thermald (redundant with intel_pstate HWP), cpufreq (overridden by TLP), bpftune (4% CPU for no desktop benefit). Removed dead code: auto-cpufreq force-disable, tlp force-disable, auto-cpufreq deps in fan-control.
stack-detection-2026-06-27: Full re-detection: 16 flake inputs (including nix-cachyos-kernel), 3 GitHub Actions workflows, 4 git submodules (nvim, firefox, awesome, secrets), 44 templates, Docker/LXC/Waydroid/QEMU containerization, sops-nix secrets, 4 hosts (bagalamukhi, matangi, bhairavi, chhinamasta).
